issue.summary: Placement status remains empty when ManagedClusterSet has no matching clusters
issue.description: When a Placement references a ManagedClusterSet that has no clusters matching the label selector, the Placement status field remains completely empty instead of reporting zero matches with appropriate conditions.

reproduction_steps.action: Create Placement targeting 'test-set' with label selector 'environment=production'
Verify no managed clusters have the 'environment=production' label
reproduction_steps.expected_result: No clusters or none with environment=production

methods: Via CLI: kubectl get placement test-placement -n placement-test -o yaml
Via ACM Console: Applications > Placements > test-placement

conditions.message: No ManagedClusters match the placement's cluster selector

placement_detail_page.decisions_section: Empty array (no clusters to place on)

impact.user_experience: Applications using this Placement receive no feedback about why their workload isn't being deployed
impact.debugging_difficulty: Users cannot distinguish between configuration errors and legitimate zero-match scenarios

bug_confirmed_if: No conditions array present in status
ACM UI shows no status information for the Placement
bug_not_present_if: Conditions array exists with PlacementSatisfied condition
ACM UI displays clear feedback about zero matches
